title: BEM-767 wake smoke
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='
'
for d in ['scripts','.github/workflows','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tmp']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 19:18 (UTC+3)'
rec=Path('scripts/record_dispatcher_wake_smoke.py')
rec.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
from pathlib import Path
SEP="\n"
KYIV=timezone(timedelta(hours=3))
STATE=Path("governance/state/dispatcher_wake_smoke_state.json")
REPORT=Path("governance/reports/dispatcher_wake_smoke_state.md")
now=datetime.now(KYIV).strftime("%Y-%m-%d | %H:%M (UTC+3)")
try:
    data=json.loads(STATE.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore")) if STATE.exists() else {}
except:
    data={}
runs=data.get("runs",[]) if isinstance(data.get("runs",[]),list) else []
runs.append({"time":now,"mode":"wake_smoke"})
data.update({"schema_version":"dispatcher_wake_smoke_state.v1","status":"wake_smoke_seen","last_seen_at":now,"runs":runs[-100:],"operator_role":"none"})
STATE.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
STATE.write_text(json.dumps(data,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+SEP,encoding="utf-8")
REPORT.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
REPORT.write_text("# Dispatcher Wake Smoke State"+SEP+SEP+"Status: wake_smoke_seen"+SEP+"Last seen: "+now+SEP+"Operator role: none"+SEP,encoding="utf-8")
print(json.dumps({"status":"wake_smoke_seen","last_seen_at":now},ensure_ascii=False))
''')
commit_script=Path('scripts/commit_dispatcher_wake_smoke_state.sh')
commit_script.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
git add -A governance/state/dispatcher_wake_smoke_state.json governance/reports/dispatcher_wake_smoke_state.md || true
git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-767 dispatcher wake smoke state"
git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
git push || true
''')
# Use actual codex workflow name.
codex=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
actual='CODEX-RUNNER'
if codex.exists():
    for line in codex.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines():
        if line.strip().startswith('name:'):
            actual=line.split(':',1)[1].strip().strip('"').strip("'")
            break
wf=Path('.github/workflows/dispatcher-wake-smoke.yml')
wf.write_text('''name: Dispatcher Wake Smoke

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  workflow_run:
    workflows: ["'''+actual+''' "]
    types:
      - completed

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: dispatcher-wake-smoke
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  smoke:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Syntax check
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/record_dispatcher_wake_smoke.py
      - name: Record wake smoke
        run: python3 scripts/record_dispatcher_wake_smoke.py
      - name: Commit wake smoke state
        run: bash scripts/commit_dispatcher_wake_smoke_state.sh
'''.replace('"'+actual+' "','"'+actual+'"'))
state={'schema_version':'dispatcher_wake_smoke_no_claude.v1','bem':'BEM-767','status':'wake_smoke_workflow_installed','codex_workflow_name':actual,'workflow':str(wf),'blocker':None,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem767_dispatcher_wake_smoke_no_claude.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem767_dispatcher_wake_smoke_no_claude.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-767 | Dispatcher Wake Smoke No Claude | INSTALLED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Codex workflow name: '+actual+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem767_dispatcher_wake_smoke_no_claude','status':'wake_smoke_workflow_installed','codex_workflow_name':actual,'blocker':None,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem767_dispatcher_wake_smoke_no_claude.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-767 installed wake smoke workflow.
')
changed_files.extend([str(rec),str(commit_script),str(wf),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Installed minimal workflow_run dispatcher smoke without Claude Action to isolate wake path from Claude provider/action issues')
"""
